ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary for the Upcoming Trip
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Please find below your flight itinerary details:

**Passenger**: John Doe
**Booking Reference**: SH1234567

**Flight 1**
  • Date: 15 September 2026
  • Flight No.: SH789
  • Departure: New York (JFK) – 08:45 AM
  • Arrival: London Heathrow (LHR) – 08:15 PM
  • Class: Business
  • Seat: 12A
  • Baggage: 2x 23kg checked bags, 1x 7kg cabin bag

**Flight 2**
  • Date: 22 September 2026
  • Flight No.: SH790
  • Departure: London Heathrow (LHR) – 02:00 PM
  • Arrival: New York (JFK) – 05:30 PM
  • Class: Business
  • Seat: 12A
  • Baggage: 2x 23kg checked bags, 1x 7kg cabin bag

**Important Information**
- Please arrive at the airport no later than 3 hours before departure.
- Due to the COVID-19 travel restrictions, you will need to present a negative PCR test taken within 72 hours of departure.
- Check-in is available online from 48 hours before departure.
- For any changes or cancellations, please contact our customer service at +1-800-555-1234 or email support@skyhighairlines.com.

We look forward to welcoming you aboard. Safe travels!

Best regards,

SkyHigh Airlines
Customer Service Team

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Action Needed Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that an outstanding invoice has been generated for your QuickBooks/Norton subscription. The details are as follows:

**Invoice Number**: QB-INV-2026-085
**Amount Due**: $1,234.56
**Due Date**: 10 September 2026

Failure to settle this invoice by the due date will result in immediate suspension of your QuickBooks/Norton services, including loss of access to critical financial data and potential legal action for non-payment.

To avoid any disruption, please complete the payment within the next 48 hours by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Once you have completed the payment, you will receive a confirmation receipt. Please keep this receipt for your records.

If you believe this notice is in error or have any questions, contact our Billing Department immediately at billing@quickbooks.com or call 1‑800‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Billing Team
Senior Billing Officer
